description: Use this API to add a flow constraint record for an individual winding of a three-winding transformer in the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing three-winding transformer flow constraint record. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_brflw_3wt_indv(eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid, bflwid, intgar, realar)
python_syntax: ierr = opf_brflw_3wt_indv(eibus, ejbus, ekbus, cktid, bflwid, intgar, realar)

parameters.name: eibus
parameters.description: From bus number the value of eibus indicates the from bus of the winding for which the flow constraint is being introduced. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ejbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ekbus
parameters.description: Third bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: bflwid
parameters.description: Branch flow constraint identifier. (input; no default allowed).

intgar.description: branch flow type (default value of 4 if new record, current value otherwise).
limit type imposed on the branch flow limits (default value of 1 if new record, current value otherwise).

realar.description: maximum normal flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new record, current value otherwise).
minimum normal flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new record, current value otherwise).
maximum emergency flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new record, current value otherwise).
minimum emergency flow limit in physical units (default value of 0.0 for new record, current value otherwise).
soft limit penalty weight (default value of 1.0 for new record, current value otherwise).

error_codes.description: non-fatal error occurred. Possible warning messages are: - Invalid branch flow type specified. - Invalid branch flow limit type specified. - Maximum normal flow limit is less than the minimum normal flow limit. - Maximum emergency flow limit is less than the minimum emergency flow limit.
specified three-winding transformer does not exist.
specified winding of three-winding transformer not found.
branch flow constraint table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
